news.t: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.

holdings.infoBox: PDN is an equity ETF with a total of 1599 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tower Semiconductor stock at 0.55%, Kingboard Laminates Holdings at 0.40%, ASMPT at 0.37%, Kulicke and Soffa Industries at 0.35%, and PLS Group at 0.30%.

overview.description: The Invesco RAFI Developed Markets ex-U.S. Small-Mid ETF (PDN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund tracks a fundamentally-weighted index of small- and mid-cap stocks from developed countries outside the US that are screened based on fundamental metrics. PDN was launched on Sep 27, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: RAFI Fundamental Select Developed ex US 1500 Index

data.title: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.
